offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, poor expense tracking causes cash flow gaps. We provide expense monitoring instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Etsy sellers struggle with tracking and categorizing their business expenses.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on expense tracking
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Join community forums for Etsy seller tools
try_it: Let users try expense categorization and dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
